title: Derived Products
description: Higher-level products (level 1b through 4) generated by applying calibration, geo-location transformations, and algorithms to produce sensor units or gridded geophysical parameters.

definitions.definition: Higher-level products (level 1b through 4) generated by applying calibration, geo-location transformations, and algorithms to produce sensor units or gridded geophysical parameters.

- 423-SPEC-001 NASA EarthScience Data Preservation Content Specification
